description: Set up a GitLab CI pipeline with stages go, test, build, and deploy, using the docker:stable image (with a docker:stable-dind service) for Docker jobs and golang:1.13.7 for Go jobs, and define variables DOCKER_DRIVER=overlay2 and MAJOR=2. In the go stage add a go build job that runs "go build -o ${CI_PROJECT_DIR}/sast" and stores the "sast" directory as an artifact, a go lint job that runs "go get -u golang.org/x/lint/golint" followed by "golint -set_exit_status", and a go test job that runs "go test -race -cover -v ./...". In the test stage add a test job (image docker:stable) that runs "./test.sh", depends on the go build job, uploads "test/fixtures/gl-sast-report.json" as an artifact, and sets the variable SAST_ANALYZER_IMAGE_TAG=$MAJOR. In the build stage define a .build template that logs into $CI_REGISTRY, builds a Docker image with tag $IMAGE_TAG and build‑arg SAST_ANALYZER_IMAGE_TAG, pushes it, and create build branch (only branches except master, IMAGE_TAG=$CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME), build edge (only master, IMAGE_TAG=edge), build major (only tags, manual, IMAGE_TAG=$MAJOR) and build tag (only tags, checks the changelog and sets IMAGE_TAG from the tag) jobs that extend this template. In the deploy stage define a .deploy template that logs in, builds a Docker image using $DOCKERFILE with build‑args SAST_ANALYZER_IMAGE_TAG=$MAJOR and a job‑specific SAST_DEFAULT_ANALYZERS list, pushes the image, runs only on tags, and instantiate many versioned jobs (11-10-stable through 13-0-stable) with DOCKERFILE=Dockerfile.v2 and their respective SAST_DEFAULT_ANALYZERS, plus a tag latest job that pulls the $MAJOR image, tags it as latest, and pushes it.
